Screen Shot 2021-08-23 at 16.07 1
Screen Shot 2021-08-23 at 16.07 1
Information: - All information I need is already here at my first glance. - Easy to understand what is it all about. - The text on the hero section is the most important part of the homepage. Users rely the whole value proposition of Bukas by just understanding the hero header text. Two users easily figured out our whole value proposition and functionality by just looking at the hero section. - It shows 'How it works' that makes it very user friendly. First impressions - 5/5 thinks it is friendly and pleasing to the eyes - 5/5 feels the website looks legit and secured that makes them comfortable to be converted. Value and purpose - 5/5 understood the value proposition of Bukas - 5/5 understood the benefit they will get to Bukas. Motivation 3/5 think they will use it if they are in need to money to pay for their tuition. 1/5 main concern is about having an interest. Product discovery - Having the credit option or wallet - Thinks that the website is focused on 1 main product.
Information: - All information I need is already here at my first glance. - Easy to understand what is it all about. - The text on the hero section is the most important part of the homepage. Users rely the whole value proposition of Bukas by just understanding the hero header text. Two users easily figured out our whole value proposition and functionality by just looking at the hero section. - It shows 'How it works' that makes it very user friendly. First impressions - 5/5 thinks it is friendly and pleasing to the eyes - 5/5 feels the website looks legit and secured that makes them comfortable to be converted. Value and purpose - 5/5 understood the value proposition of Bukas - 5/5 understood the benefit they will get to Bukas. Motivation 3/5 think they will use it if they are in need to money to pay for their tuition. 1/5 main concern is about having an interest. Product discovery - Having the credit option or wallet - Thinks that the website is focused on 1 main product.

Information Architecture

User Test (Usability Testing) & Metrics
User Test (Usability Testing) & Metrics
The Design
The Design
Research & Data Insights How likely are they to submit an application every time a user asks for their computation via support? Roughly 16% (3/18) submitted an application Around 44% (8/18) created an account There's a slight difference with the type of devices our users use since the lockdown has started. Desktop users → from 15-16% to 20-24% Majority of our users still use their mobile phones to access our website. The visitor → registrant conversion rate is around 22%. According to a study, the average landing page conversion rate falls around 2.35%. The top 25% sites are converting at 5.31% and above, while the top 10% are looking at 11.45% and above.
Research & Data Insights How likely are they to submit an application every time a user asks for their computation via support? Roughly 16% (3/18) submitted an application Around 44% (8/18) created an account There's a slight difference with the type of devices our users use since the lockdown has started. Desktop users → from 15-16% to 20-24% Majority of our users still use their mobile phones to access our website. The visitor → registrant conversion rate is around 22%. According to a study, the average landing page conversion rate falls around 2.35%. The top 25% sites are converting at 5.31% and above, while the top 10% are looking at 11.45% and above.
User interview Insights Here are the three key pain points and insights (related to the discovery phase) gathered from the interviews: 1. User's expectations (The reason why they decided to create an account): 1. See Bukas as an option to pay for their tuition. 2. Installment option for their tuition 3. They are in need of financial help 2. Information they needed (Details that matter to them): 1. End-to-end process (How to apply, repayments) 2. Eligibility and requirements 3. Pricing and rates 3. Motivation (What should've motivated them to apply): 1. If there's an actual need from both student and guardian. 2. If the rates are lower. 3. If all information were clear.
User interview Insights Here are the three key pain points and insights (related to the discovery phase) gathered from the interviews: 1. User's expectations (The reason why they decided to create an account): 1. See Bukas as an option to pay for their tuition. 2. Installment option for their tuition 3. They are in need of financial help 2. Information they needed (Details that matter to them): 1. End-to-end process (How to apply, repayments) 2. Eligibility and requirements 3. Pricing and rates 3. Motivation (What should've motivated them to apply): 1. If there's an actual need from both student and guardian. 2. If the rates are lower. 3. If all information were clear.
